metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

hey, could you write a short scene. like.. night market in Marrakech, busy city vibes. there are four characters. Khalil, a Berber merchant dude. li wei, a Chinese tourist. Adebayo, a Nigerian student. and seamus, an Irish backpacker. scenes where they interact, maybe a little disagreement or smth? around ivi two hundred words?
messages.targeted_response_start: “The Berber merchant, old man Khalil, was shrewd, of course, always trying to get one over on the tourists. The Nigerian student, Adebayo, seemed completely lost, wandering around like he’d never seen spices before.
